name: Five Eyes Intelligence Alliance
climate: Diverse: temperate maritime (GBR, NZL), continental (CAN, USA interior), arid (AUS interior), tropical (northern AUS, Hawaii), arctic (northern CAN, AK)

neighbors.name: Group of Seven
neighbors.relevance: USA, UK, Canada overlap; Five Eyes intelligence informs G7 sanctions and policy

neighbors.name: AUKUS
neighbors.relevance: USA, UK, Australia overlap; AUKUS is the defense-tech subset of Five Eyes

neighbors.name: Quadrilateral Security Dialogue
neighbors.relevance: USA and Australia overlap; Quad extends Five Eyes reach into Indo-Pacific

neighbors.name: NAFTA/USMCA
neighbors.relevance: USA and Canada are both USMCA and Five Eyes; trade and security interlinked

neighbors.name: Nordic Council
neighbors.relevance: Close intelligence partners; Nordic states share signals intelligence with Five Eyes

links.description: Three of five members form AUKUS; nuclear submarine and advanced tech sharing
Five Eyes intelligence underpins G7 economic security and sanctions coordination
USA and Australia bridge Five Eyes and Quad; Indo-Pacific intelligence sharing
Five Eyes maritime surveillance covers Indo-Pacific sea lanes and chokepoints
Canada and USA have Arctic sovereignty interests; monitoring Russian Northern Sea Route
Canada, Australia, New Zealand in CPTPP; Five Eyes trade screening affects market access
